overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The player character moves from a residential plaza through a traditional red torii gate and along a commercial street beneath an elevated highway, passing pedestrians and neon-lit storefronts in a sunlit cyberpunk setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential plaza with concrete steps leading to sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete steps from plaza onto green paved sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with grid windows and balconies
wide concrete staircase leading down from plaza to street level
rectangular white planters with greenery arranged on the plaza
green painted pedestrian walkway with tile pattern
green metal pipe railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a residential plaza with a beige apartment building and concrete steps. The player descends the steps onto a green paved sidewalk, passing white planters and following a metal railing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional red torii gate entrance marking district boundary

events.description: passing through the red torii gate structure from plaza into the commercial street

agents.ego_description: walking through the red gate structure, navigating past pedestrians on the narrow sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit and blue top walking toward the camera

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style red gate structure with curved roof and hanging paper lanterns
commercial building entrance with prominent red support pillars
steam or smoke rising from a vent near the street

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a prominent red torii gate that marks the entrance to a commercial district. The space becomes semi-covered under the gate structure, with steam rising from street vents and pedestrians walking in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath elevated highway with palm trees and holographic advertisements

events.description: emerging from under the torii gate into open street beneath massive elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the green sidewalk under the overpass, approaching an intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a yellow food stall bench on the right side

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure casting shadows over the street
tall palm trees lining the street under the overpass
large glowing green holographic advertisement showing a human figure
small yellow food vendor stall with graffiti on the side

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate, the scene opens into a wide street beneath a massive elevated highway. Palm trees line the sidewalk and a large green holographic billboard glows in the distance. The player passes a yellow food stall where someone is sitting.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts and vending machines

events.description: entering shaded area under building awnings with neon lighting becoming more prominent

agents.ego_description: walking past neon-lit storefronts and vending machines along the covered sidewalk

entered.detail: commercial shops with glowing neon signs including coffee and restaurant signage
futuristic vending machine with illuminated display on the sidewalk
rounded corner building with multiple stories and balconies
external AC units mounted on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a more enclosed commercial area with neon-lit storefronts and vending machines. The elevated highway remains overhead but the surroundings become more urban with curved buildings and external air conditioning units. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural and artificial neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street transitioning to open plaza with traditional hanging lanterns

events.description: approaching open area with traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead

agents.ego_description: walking toward an open plaza area with hanging red lanterns, passing by closed storefronts

entered.detail: traditional red paper lanterns hanging in a row over the street
large flat digital advertisement screen showing product imagery

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up as the player approaches an area decorated with traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead. The elevated highway recedes to the left as the street widens, with large digital billboards visible ahead and palm trees lining the approach to a more open plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet residential plaza into a dense, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by descending concrete steps past a beige apartment building and white planters, following a metal railing onto a green paved sidewalk. As the camera passes through a prominent red torii gate, the environment shifts into a semi-covered space filled with rising steam and passing pedestrians before opening onto a wide street beneath a massive elevated highway. The scene then transitions into a more enclosed urban corridor of curved buildings, vending machines, and neon storefronts where natural light blends with artificial glows. Finally, the space expands again as the highway recedes, leading the camera under hanging red paper lanterns and past palm trees toward a wide plaza dominated by large digital billboards.
